description: Tasks that require evaluating customer service, product quality, or business operations from a customer perspective

tasks.title: Evaluate Coffee Shop Service - Morning Rush Hour
tasks.description: Visit Brew & Bean Coffee during morning rush (7-9 AM) as a regular customer. Evaluate service speed, staff friendliness, coffee quality, and cleanliness. Order a medium latte and pastry.

evidence_schema.description: Purchase receipt showing date, time, and items ordered
Coffee and pastry purchased (quality check)
Service evaluation: wait time, staff behavior, cleanliness, coffee quality (1-10 scale for each)

tasks.title: Test Fast Food Drive-Through Efficiency
tasks.description: Mystery shop the drive-through at Burger Palace during lunch hour. Time the service from order to pickup, evaluate order accuracy, food temperature, and staff communication.

evidence_schema.description: Drive-through receipt with timestamp
Service timing, order accuracy, food quality, staff politeness ratings
Total drive-through time from order placement to food receipt

tasks.title: Assess Retail Store Customer Service - Electronics
tasks.description: Visit TechMart as a customer seeking help choosing a laptop under $800. Evaluate staff knowledge, helpfulness, and sales approach. Don't feel pressured to purchase.

evidence_schema.description: Store interior and electronics section (discrete photos)
Staff knowledge level, helpfulness, pressure tactics, product recommendations quality

tasks.title: Evaluate Restaurant Dining Experience - Casual Dining
tasks.description: Dine at Olive Garden Family Restaurant during dinner hours. Assess greeting, seating time, server attentiveness, food quality, and overall experience. Order from lunch menu.
tasks.location_hint: Olive Garden Family Restaurant, westside location

evidence_schema.description: Dining receipt with date, time, server name if available
Food presentation and dining area ambiance
Comprehensive dining evaluation: service timing, food quality, cleanliness, value for money

tasks.title: Test Bank Customer Service - New Account Inquiry
tasks.description: Visit First National Bank to inquire about opening a checking account. Evaluate staff professionalism, wait time, information provided, and sales approach. No need to actually open account.

evidence_schema.description: Bank lobby and customer service area (if permitted)
Wait time, staff knowledge, information accuracy, pressure to open account, overall professionalism

tasks.title: Evaluate Grocery Store Self-Checkout Experience
tasks.description: Shop at SuperMarket Plus and use self-checkout for 5-8 small items. Evaluate ease of use, staff assistance availability, machine reliability, and overall customer experience.

evidence_schema.description: Self-checkout receipt showing successful transaction
Self-checkout usability, technical issues, staff help availability, comparison to staffed checkout

tasks.title: Test Pharmacy Drive-Through Service
tasks.description: Visit MediCare Pharmacy drive-through to pick up an over-the-counter item (like vitamins). Evaluate service speed, staff communication, and convenience factors.

evidence_schema.description: Purchase receipt from drive-through transaction
Drive-through efficiency, staff clarity, wait time, ease of transaction
Total time from arrival to departure

tasks.title: Assess Hotel Lobby and Front Desk Service
tasks.description: Visit Grand Plaza Hotel lobby as a potential guest inquiring about room rates and amenities for next month. Evaluate staff professionalism and information provided.

evidence_schema.description: Hotel lobby area and front desk (if permitted)
Front desk service quality, information accuracy, staff professionalism, lobby cleanliness

tasks.title: Evaluate Auto Service Center Customer Experience
tasks.description: Visit QuickLube Express for an oil change quote and inspection of waiting area. Assess customer service, facility cleanliness, and estimated service time without committing to service.

evidence_schema.description: Waiting area and service bay visibility
Staff knowledge, service estimates, facility cleanliness, customer amenities

tasks.title: Test Mobile Phone Store Sales Approach
tasks.description: Visit Wireless World as a customer looking to upgrade phone plan. Evaluate sales tactics, plan explanation clarity, and pressure to purchase accessories. Gather information only.

evidence_schema.description: Store layout and phone displays (discrete photos)
Sales approach quality, plan explanation clarity, pushy tactics, staff knowledge level
